texto: I was 11 when a teacher suggested to my parents that they should send me to drama classes to curb my disruptive ways in the classroom. The next Saturday I was acting, and thereafter it became a ritual of my youth to see a show at the Belvoir on Sundays and, if I was lucky, another at the Opera House on Monday after school.
explicacao: Orientação direta de David Wenham sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “I was 11 when a teacher suggested to my parents that they should send me to drama classes to curb…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, school, parents, útil em momentos de segunda-feira e termino.
